description_long: This is a pair of low-top sneakers in a pale yellow color with a clean, minimalist design. The upper appears to be made of canvas or a similar textile, featuring standard criss-cross lacing with matching yellow laces. The shoes have a white rubber sole with a textured toe cap and sidewall for added durability and grip. The interior lining is a lighter mesh material, providing breathability and comfort. A white logo is visible on the tongue and heel tab, indicating the brand. The overall appearance is fresh and unworn, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A pair of pale yellow low-top sneakers with white rubber soles, criss-cross laces, and visible branding on the tongue and heel. The shoes are clean, minimalist, and appear new.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical toe caps, laces, and white logo on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the side profile, lacing, and textured white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel tabs and prominent white logo on the back of the soles.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective showing the side profile, lacing, and clean lines of the shoe.
attribute_logo: White 'DC' logo on the tongue and heel tab
